creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #19)
I did not forget. I only removed the BROKEN line and rebuild the pkg in poudriere.

I think the fix is that freebsd 13.3 uses a newer version of llvm/clang than freebsd 13.2.
So the solution of the issue is more like 'overcome by events'.
